violations.text: The painted ceiling in the kitchen area was observed to have peeling/chipped paint. Painted surface is to be properly repaired and resealed. (Proper coatings for indoor surfaces were discussed at the time of inspection.) New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2026

The ceiling in the basement warewashing and food prep areas was observed to have tiles that are not smooth and easily cleanable. The ceiling is to be constructed of SMOOTH, durable, and EASILY CLEANABLE surfaces for areas where FOOD ESTABLISHMENT operations are conducted and Nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as FOOD preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, WAREWASHING areas, toilet rooms, mobile FOOD ESTABLISHMENT SERVICING AREAS, and areas subject to flushing or spray cleaning methods. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2026

The ice scoop is stored with the handle in-contact with the food (ice). During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the coffe-bar. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink at the bar. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the coffee bar. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023

The handsink at the bar outside of the hotel was observed connected to a garden hose. Plumbing systems and hoses conveying water must be made of approved materials and be smooth, durable, nonabsorbent, and corrosion-resistant. If not, the system may constitute a health hazard because unsuitable surfaces may harbor disease organisms or it may be constructed of materials that may, themselves, contaminate the water supply. PIC to discontinue use of hand sink until it can be connected to an approved plumbing system. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023
The handsink at the outside bar is draining into a container. Drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023
